nl_query: Which questions participate in a GROUP-type attempt rule?
failed_sql:
SELECT q.id, q.code, q.path, arg.group_label, argq.question_id AS group_member_question_id
FROM   attempt_rule_group          arg
JOIN   attempt_rule_group_question argq ON argq.group_id       = arg.id
JOIN   question                    q_parent ON q_parent.id = arg.question_id
JOIN   question                    q_member ON q_member.id = argq.question_id
WHERE  arg.rule_type = 'GROUP'
ORDER  BY q_parent.path, arg.group_label, q_member.display_order;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): attempt_rule_group.question_id, attempt_rule_group.rule_type. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
